name: Petroleum Jelly
description: A refined, inert hydrocarbon ointment base. Serves as a highly effective physical occlusive skin barrier. Smothers burrowing ectoparasites like jiggers (tungiasis), blocks larval soil entry, and traps epidermal moisture.
preparation: Cleanse affected lower legs and apply generous thick topical layer over burrowing lesions or dry, cracked skin twice daily.
safetyAlert: Safe for all demographics. For external topical use only. Do not apply over deep, uncleaned purulent wounds to prevent anaerobic bacterial growth.
interactions: None recorded. Highly stable topical base.
